career_angle: Consider how this development might affect your role. The skills that matter are shifting - make sure yours are shifting with them.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: Replicate Blog classified as tier_5 (unclassified or low-reliability source, reliability: 20%)

factors.name: Evidence Quality
factors.rationale: no benchmarks, datasets, or peer-reviewed citations in this Replicate Blog article

factors.name: Conflict of Interest
factors.rationale: no overt promotional language in this Replicate Blog piece, independence unconfirmed

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: claims not cross-referenced against external expert consensus

factors.name: Specificity
factors.rationale: no vague hedging language detected; contains specific numbers/data

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: Replicate Blog: insufficient history to assess; 1 red flags detected (track record penalty: -1)
